subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Thy letter was received, and owing to lack of time, I am writing this brief response. Thou hadst inquired about astronomy. Whatever dependeth on mathematics is acceptable
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی نامه شما وصول یافت و از عدم فرصت جواب مختصر مرقوم میگردد از علم
subcodes.subjects: @celestial spheres [aflak]; planets; astronomy, @mystical themes, @astrology and numerology, @superstition, @birth of Christ; purity; virginity of Mary
